'''Karaksk Vey'lya''' was a [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who joined the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], serving as a [[Chief of Staff/Legends|Chief of Staff]] to [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Pors Tonith/Legends|Pors Tonith]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. During the [[Battle of Praesitlyn]], he was captured by [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] and his troops.

{{Char-stub}}
